title: SCN-LLM Prototype: a synthetic reference implementation of the SCN temporal module
description: A single-machine synthetic reference implementation of an SCN-inspired temporal module for large language models: a coupled Van der Pol oscillator clock, phase-response entrainment to a synthetic zeitgeber, an analytic 16-D temporal-state map, and a toy phase-modulated retrieval path, with a reproducible four-figure mechanism-and-cost evaluation. It does not measure believability, engagement, trust, or retrieval quality.
